final_state.sitemap_status: valid, 321 URLs, includes all indexable pages
final_state.note_on_orphans: Re-checked 2026-04-23: all 39 posts in category "אתרים" (id 36) appear in the paginated category archive HTML (pages 1–7). Earlier "1 orphan" counts that only parsed category page 1 (or only page bodies) overstated the issue. A stronger hub→archive inlink from page 1851 is prepared in-repo (Round 7 script) for crawlers that weight page inlinks heavily.
final_state.hsts_header: missing on cached pages (Cloudflare-served). Present on dynamic routes (wp-login).

url_normalization.uppercase_slug_canonical: returns 200 but canonical correctly points to lowercase
url_normalization.double_slash_canonical: returns 200 but canonical incorrectly points to home (edge case, no internal links affected)

final_state.faq_schema_coverage: 63/63 pages with visible FAQ have FAQPage schema (100%)
final_state.schema_validation: All JSON-LD blocks parse successfully across top pages (home/services/about/contact). Types include WebPage, BreadcrumbList, WebSite, ProfessionalService, FAQPage, AboutPage, ContactPage, ItemList, AggregateRating.
final_state.whatsapp_bridge_page: brndini.co.il/whatsapp/ (id 327458) — noindex, 200 OK, JS redirects to wa.me with dynamic ?text= passthrough.
final_state.featured_image_coverage: 100% on indexable posts (19 generated in Round 6)

fixes_applied_live: Yoast PHP redirects enabled; 7 x 301 redirects added for broken footer URLs (privacy, copywriting, SEO, 2 case-study + Hebrew/percent variants). All verified 301 -> final 200.
Replaced 14 broken image references (placeholder-*, corrupted Hebrew filenames) with known-good assets in active header/contact templates and on home/services/about/ty pages.
Cloudflare email-obfuscation eliminated on Accessibility page by replacing plaintext email with "office [at]" pattern.
Excerpts shortened on 3 posts with over-long meta descriptions.
Elementor body-end snippet (327451) rewrites linkedin.com/company/brndini -> linkedin.com/company/mdn-il in both <a href> and <script type=application/ld+json>, site-wide, with MutationObserver.
Added internal links from service hub pages (graphic design, copywriting, services index) to orphan service pages (flyer, rollup, facebook cover, about-page copywriting, careers).

Optimized heaviest homepage hero image: switched Elementor image widget from 2000x1333 (665KB) to 1024x1024 (348KB), adding responsive srcset + lazy loading. -48% weight on that asset, -23% on total homepage image payload.
Added security meta snippet (327457) with Content-Security-Policy upgrade-insecure-requests + Referrer-Policy strict-origin-when-cross-origin at elementor_head.

Created noindex bridge page /whatsapp/ (id 327458) with JS redirect + <noscript> meta-refresh + visible fallback button for graceful degradation. Snippet 327459 injects meta robots=noindex,nofollow,noarchive only on /whatsapp/ path.

Deployed Elementor snippet 327460 at elementor_body_end that rewrites every a[href*=wa.me/] to /whatsapp/?text=... with MutationObserver for dynamic content. Resolves Semrush false-positive "362 external links broken" once the audit runs with JS rendering enabled.

Generated 19 new featured images for posts that were missing one, via Leonardo AI (Phoenix 1.0). Consistent brand vibe: blue #1D61F2 to purple #745DB6 gradient, soft 3D hero objects matched to each topic (TikTok phone, LinkedIn briefcase, design tools, landing-page mockup). Images converted to WebP (~34-75KB each), uploaded with Hebrew alt text, set as featured_media. After re-saving each post, Yoast now serves the new image as og:image on all 19 posts.

snippets_deployed_via_rest.purpose: rewrite bad LinkedIn URL in <a> and JSON-LD

round_7_automation.unified_script: seo-audit/apply_plan_round7.py (hub page 1851 + Yoast meta on posts 322835, 322826, 322505; reads seo-audit/credentials.local or env)

yoast_post_title_template.note: Not exposed on /wp/v2/settings; Yoast REST is read-only for options.

meta_descriptions_over_160.strategy: Copy excerpt (plain text) into _yoast_wpseo_metadesc via REST; fallback strings in SEO_META_FIXES_ROUND7.md

requires_admin_access_not_rest: Yoast title template: Posts SEO title "%%title%% %%sep%% %%sitename%%" -> "%%title%%" to shorten 41 long titles at once. (Automatable on-host via seo-audit/apply_yoast_post_title_template_round7.sh with WP-CLI.)
Cloudflare Email Obfuscation OFF (user has no CF access; skipped).
Edit brndini-seo-master plugin PHP to permanently change LinkedIn URL (JS snippet covers runtime today).
HSTS header (Strict-Transport-Security) — add via Cloudways Application > Security > Headers, or Cloudflare page rule. Not applicable via REST.

Semrush: re-crawl the site with "JS rendering" enabled (Project Settings -> Site Audit -> JS rendering -> Enabled). The existing 362 wa.me "broken external links" are false positives caused by wa.me blocking bots; the deployed JS rewrite converts them to internal /whatsapp/ links on page load.
fixes_pending_deployment_round7: Create seo-audit/credentials.local from credentials.example (gitignored), then: python3 seo-audit/apply_plan_round7.py && python3 seo-audit/verify_plan_round7.py
On WordPress host: bash seo-audit/apply_yoast_post_title_template_round7.sh (wpseo_titles[title-post]=%%title%%), purge FlyingPress, spot-check <title> on sample posts.
Semrush: follow seo-audit/SEMRUSH_SITE_AUDIT.md and re-run audit.
If REST ignores Yoast meta: paste from seo-audit/SEO_META_FIXES_ROUND7.md in wp-admin for the three post IDs.
